REVIEW COMPLETE – Summary follows. CORRECTNESS: All seven security layers in POST /api/reviews/submit are correctly ordered and implemented. Token HMAC-SHA256 verification uses constant-time comparison. Feature flag is checked first. No database writes in submission path (confirmed by grep and static analysis). SMTP delivery correctly uses REVIEW_RECIPIENT_EMAIL from env. Init container preflight blocks pod start on misconfiguration. STYLE: escapeHtml is duplicated between review-delivery.ts and security.ts (private copy in delivery); recommend reusing security.ts export. auth.ts uses console.warn/console.log for GitHub auth events instead of structured logger. EVT_LINKEDIN_AUTH_DENIED constant defined in logger.ts is never emitted. EDGE CASES: Timing-safe comparison handles length-mismatch by comparing against zero-buffer – safe in practice since HMAC-SHA256 base64url output is fixed length. Rate-limit store evicts by insertion order which may not be true LRU but is acceptable. vitest jsdom environment used for all tests including Node-only modules – unlikely to cause failures. TEST COVERAGE: Comprehensive coverage across all modules. 9 test files covering token minting/verification, CSRF, rate limiting, replay prevention, delivery, HTML escaping, callback URL sanitization, page render states, form validation, and integration flows. Missing: tests for instrumentation.ts startup log and live SMTP delivery (expected omissions). TASK 011 CHANGES VERIFIED: k8s/deployment.yaml now includes all three review-link env vars (REVIEW_LINK_SECRET, REVIEW_RECIPIENT_EMAIL, FEATURE_REVIEW_LINKS) sourced from review-link-secrets sealed secret. Init container preflight correctly validates flag values and required vars when enabled. deploy.yaml validates presence of these keys on every CI run. docs/review-links-rollout.md provides rollout and rollback procedure. BLOCKING ISSUE (inherited): k8s/review-link-secrets-sealed.yaml still contains PLACEHOLDER_SEAL_WITH_KUBESEAL values – must be replaced with real kubeseal output before any staging/production deployment. DELIVERABLE: docs/review-links-runbook.md created covering all required sections.
